# Repotting log

Grower: Jean Marie Dean
Linked: [[spike-watch-2026]]

## Done this cycle
- Cattleya 'Crystelle' into fresh medium-bark
- Two Phals into sphagnum after bloom

## Next
- Repot the big Paph clump after Oct 31

# Spike watch 2026

Grower: Jean Marie Dean
Linked: [[repotting-log]]

## Watching
- Two Phals throwing spikes
- Cymbidium starting to push

## Next
- Stake spikes before they set crooked

# Show judging feedback notes

Grower: Jean Marie Dean
Linked: [[show-feedback-notes]]

## Last show takeaways
- Watch leaf spotting on entries
- Groom flowers earlier on load-in day

## Next
- Apply notes to the December entries

# Light & humidity experiment

Grower: Jean Marie Dean
Linked: [[spike-watch-2026]]

- Moved a shelf closer to the south window
- Added a small humidifier

## Next
- Compare spike rate vs the old shelf
